blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
